chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Imagine a regular day in your life.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: You wake up in the morning to the automatic curtains and lighting in your room controlled by AI.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Your alarm rings based on your schedule, in your calendar, and the time you slept at.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: All through the night, your AC was adjusting to suit your body temperature.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Now that you are up, every single activity around you is driven through machine learning.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Your mobile phone has organized news for you based on your interests.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: This uses neighborhood-based algorithms along with naive base.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Finally, the cab that you booked online uses algorithms to make the lowest cost trip fulfillment for the company.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Based on this, the cab company say Uber decides which among the hundreds of available cabs should be assigned to your trip

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: so that the cost is minimized for the company.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Machine learning has engulfed every part of our lives.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Machine learning uses algorithms to mimic human learnings in machines.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: It is a subset of artificial intelligence.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: To simplify this idea, let us take up a small story.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Imagine that you have photos of your favorite pets, Bruno and Kitty.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Is there a way to explain to a machine how to distinguish a cat from a dog?

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: You can feed the machine with hundreds and thousands of photos of cats and dogs,

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: teaching the machine to build up a model based on these examples.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: This is what we term as supervised learning.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: We give the machine examples of each animal showing its features

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: and the machine learns how to differentiate between a dog and a cat.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: This way, it can recognize your Bruno and Kitty.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Classification and regression are the two most popular methods and decision tree.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Naive bays, linear regression and SVM are the most popular algorithms in supervised learning.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: In unsupervised learning, you don't really have a predetermined result in mind.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Much like how a child explores the world on its own,

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: the machine tries to make sense of things from huge amounts of data.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Given many photos of animals, the machine starts segregating them by color, size and shape.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Such an approach is known as unsupervised learning.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Clustering and association are the types of unsupervised learning,

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: covering algorithms such as K-means, hierarchical, a priori and genetic algorithms.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Reinforcement learning is very similar to how children learn.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: When you were a child, you were rewarded for your good deeds and punished for making mistakes.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: This reinforced you to perform better than you were before.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Similarly, users, just like parents, teach a machine where it made a mistake

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: and where it was right.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Thus, the machine develops intelligence and makes better decisions in the future because of this reinforcement.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Google's AI can now design better AI than humans could.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Isn't this mind-blowing?

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: It is like we are playing God where our creation is creating better creations.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: The AI algorithm, developed by Chinese retail giant Alibaba,

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: outscored humans in the Stanford question answering data set,

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: showing that AI is now better at reading than humans.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Another interesting article talks about five things AI does better than humans,

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: including building wooden block towers, lip reading, transcribing, news reporting and disease diagnosis.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: An average machine learning engineer earns about 140,000 US dollars a year.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Isn't that alone motivating enough?

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Here are the most buzzing job roles you will be eligible for once you learn the fundamentals of machine learning.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: 1. Machine Learning Engineer

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: 2. Deep Learning Engineer

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: 3. AI Engineer

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: 4. Data Scientist

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Do check out our SimplyLearns Machine Learning Certification Training

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: where you will master the concepts of supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement learning.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Working on algorithms such as decision tree, regression, naive bays and SVM

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: and applications of ML through 25 plus hands-on exercises and four real-life industry projects.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Thanks for watching.

chunks.title: Machine Learning In 5 Minutes ｜ Machine Learning Introduction ｜What Is Machine Learning ｜Simplilearn [-DEL6SVRPw0]
chunks.text: Thank you.
